ja.title: 行をまるごと書き換える
ja.description: 1 行目を This line is right に書き換えてください。2 行目はそのまま
hints: cc は行の中身を消して、その行の入力に入る
notes: cc で行の内容を入れ替える
S は cc と同じ働きの 1 打版

en.title: Change a whole line
en.description: Rewrite the first line as 'This line is right', leaving the second line alone
hints: cc clears the line and drops you into insert on it
notes: cc replaces the contents of the line
S is a one-key synonym for cc
